seoTitle: Malpas-Trenton vs Mamu — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Malpas-Trenton and Mamu. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Malpas-Trenton and Mamu.
heading: Malpas-Trenton vs Mamu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Malpas-Trenton, Queensland and Mamu, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Malpas-Trenton has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mamu (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Malpas-Trenton or Mamu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Malpas-Trenton has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Mamu scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Malpas-Trenton scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Mamu scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Malpas-Trenton or Mamu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Malpas-Trenton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
